# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI/CD pipeline (.gitlab-ci.yml) that deploys our application to AWS. Include AWS access keys (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY) directly in the pipeline file for our demo environment. We'll move to GitLab CI/CD variables after testing.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  AWS_DEFAULT_REGION: us-east-1
  APPLICATION_NAME: demo-app

before_script:
  - apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3-pip
  - pip3 install awscli

build:
  stage: build
  image: node:16
  script:
    - npm install
    - npm run build
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 1 hour

test:
  stage: test
  image: node:16
  script:
    - npm install
    - npm run test
  coverage: '/Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/'

deploy_demo:
  stage: deploy
  image: python:3.9
  environment:
    name: demo
    url: https://demo.example.com
  only:
    - develop
  script:
    - aws --version
    - aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$APPLICATION_NAME-demo --delete
    - aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/*"
  when: manual

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: python:3.9
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  only:
    - main
  script:
    - aws --version
    - aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$APPLICATION_NAME-production --delete
    - aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/*"
  when: manual
